templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Manage questionnaire templates for your 1:1 sessions
templates.emptyDesc: Create your first template to get started.

create.title: Create Template
create.description: Create a new questionnaire template for your 1:1 sessions.
create.descPlaceholder: Describe what this template is for...

editor.archiveDesc: Are you sure you want to archive "{name}"? It will be hidden from the active list but historical session data will be preserved.
editor.descPlaceholder: Describe what this template is for...
editor.noLabels: No labels yet. Labels can be created via the API.
editor.noSections: No sections yet. Add a section to organize your questions.
editor.removeSectionDesc: Remove "{name}" and all its questions? This takes effect when you save.
editor.questionDesc: Configure the question details and answer type.
editor.questionTextPlaceholder: What would you like to ask?
editor.helpTextPlaceholder: Additional context or instructions for this question
editor.scoreWeightDesc: 0 = excluded from scoring, 1 = normal, 2 = double impact

questionCard.removeDesc: Are you sure you want to remove this question? This change takes effect when you save the template.

step1.title: Select File
step1.description: Upload a .json template file exported from this app.

languageMismatch.title: Language Mismatch
languageMismatch.message: This template is in {fileLanguage} but your company uses {companyLanguage}.

import.schemaVersionUnsupported: This file uses schema version {version}, but only version 1 is supported.

conditionalLogic.title: Show this question conditionally
conditionalLogic.description: Only show when a previous answer matches a condition
conditionalLogic.noEarlierQuestions: No earlier questions available. Conditional logic can only reference questions that appear before this one.
conditionalLogic.allFieldsRequired: All three fields are required for conditional logic

resetConfirm.title: Start over?
resetConfirm.description: This will clear the template and conversation. This cannot be undone.

preview.title: Template Preview
preview.empty: Your template will appear here as you chat

chat.placeholder: Describe your team, goals, or ask for changes...
chat.errorToast: AI generation failed. Please try again.
chat.greetingNew:
Hi! I'm here to help you build a 1:1 template tailored to your team.

To get started — who are you having these 1:1s with? Tell me a bit about their role and the size of your team.
chat.greetingExisting:
Hi! I can see your current template. I can suggest improvements, add or remove questions, or restructure sections.

What would you like to change — or should I take a look and give you my recommendations?

length.title: Keep it short
length.body: 8–12 questions per session is ideal. A template that gets completed every time beats a comprehensive one that gets abandoned halfway.

specific.title: Specific questions surface real signal
specific.body: Avoid vague openers like "How are things going?" — prefer "What's blocking your progress this week?" Specific questions are actionable.

balance.title: Mix retrospective and prospective
balance.body: Balance questions about what happened (last week's blockers, wins) with questions about what's next (goals, growth).

helpText.title: Anchor your rating scales
helpText.body: Use help text to define both endpoints: "1 = blocked and frustrated, 5 = fully focused and productive." Ambiguous scales produce noise, not signal.

safety.title: Prioritise psychological safety
safety.body: Questions should feel safe to answer honestly, even to a manager with authority. Avoid questions that feel like performance evaluations.

coverage.title: Cover the five areas
coverage.body: High-quality templates address: wellbeing, work progress, blockers, growth, and manager feedback.
